title: SI Death Bolt
description: Spawns a lightning bolt upon player death and broadcasts a message in chat.
body:
[![Kinetic Hosting Banner](https://i.imgur.com/bIJz4CP.png)](https://www.soncresity.industries/kinetic-hosting/)

# 🌐 SI: Death Bolt

> Spawns a lightning bolt upon player death and broadcasts a message in chat.

***

## ✨ Overview

SI: Death Bolt is a lightweight mod, summoning a lightning bolt on player death at the death location and posting a message into chat.

***

## 🔧 Features

### [Lightnign Bolt](https://iki.soncresity.industries/sidb/lightning-bolt)

As soon as a player dies, the mod will summon a lightning bolt on the player's death location.

### [Death Message](https://iki.soncresity.industries/sidb/death-message)

When a player dies, the mod will broadcast a message in chat, announcing that they died.

***

## 📦 Requirements

*   Minecraft 1.21.1, 1.21.4, 1.21.8, 1.21.10 or 1.21.11
*   SI: Essentials
*   NeoForge

***
